channel.title: Networking on Scorpiosec
channel.description: Recent content in Networking on Scorpiosec

item.title: Comparing the Building Blocks: OSI Model vs. TCP/IP Model
item.description: Introduction Networking – a skill that resonates loudly in the realm of technical IT roles. It’s a non-negotiable proficiency for anyone navigating the intricate landscapes of information technology. At the heart of this expertise are two pivotal models: the Open Systems Interconnection (OSI) model and the Transmission Control Protocol/Internet Protocol (TCP/IP) model. Serving as foundational blueprints, these models play a crucial role in designing, implementing, and troubleshooting networks. They offer a conceptual framework that streamlines communication between devices.
